name: braindrain
description: Single-plugin marketplace for braindrain — a Claude Code status-line indicator that flips between SMART (green) and DUMB (red) at 100k input tokens.

plugins.name: braindrain
plugins.description: Status-line indicator: green SMART below 100k tokens, red DUMB at or above. Based on Dex Horthy's Smart Zone / Dumb Zone framing and Chroma's Context Rot research.
